emails.subject: Dow Chemical
emails.body: Dow Chemical Do we had any NDAs in place with the referenced counterparty. In particular, they seem to be interested in the liquids trading/group. Thanks!

emails.subject: Dow Chemical
emails.body: Dow Chemical Do we had any NDAs in place with the referenced counterparty. In particular, they seem to be interested in the liquids trading/group. Thanks!

emails.subject: Re: Dow Chemical
emails.body: Re: Dow Chemical ENA has an agreement with Dow Chemical re Possibility of ENA supplying steam and electricity to Dow's Freeport, Texas site. And I believe there is a draft out to Dow Chemical relating to the Offline project Enron Net Works Kay C. Young Legal Specialist Enron North America Corp. 713-853-6794 Phone 713-646-3393 Fax kay.young@enron.com Tana Jones 04/13/2001 09:50 AM
